title: Spelling Stars - Spell the Word
description: A spelling challenge adventure where children spell words letter by letter.
author: Freya Stories

pages.text: The squirrel found a shiny acorn under the big tree.
A fluffy rabbit hopped across the meadow.
You spelled all the words! What a spelling star you are!

localizedTitle.es: Estrellas del Deletreo - Deletrea la Palabra
localizedTitle.it: Stelle del Compitare - Compita la Parola
localizedTitle.pt: Estrelas da Soletração - Soletre a Palavra
localizedTitle.ja: スペリングスター - 言葉をつづろう
localizedTitle.zh: 拼写之星 - 拼出单词

localizedDescription.en: A spelling challenge adventure where children spell words letter by letter.
localizedDescription.pl: Przygoda z wyzwaniem literowania, gdzie dzieci literują słowa litera po literze.
localizedDescription.es: Una aventura de deletreo donde los niños deletrean palabras letra por letra.
localizedDescription.de: Ein Buchstabierabenteuer, bei dem Kinder Wörter Buchstabe für Buchstabe buchstabieren.
localizedDescription.fr: Une aventure d'orthographe où les enfants épellent les mots lettre par lettre.
localizedDescription.it: Un'avventura di compitazione dove i bambini compitano le parole lettera per lettera.
localizedDescription.pt: Uma aventura de soletração onde as crianças soletram palavras letra por letra.
localizedDescription.ja: 子どもたちが一文字ずつ言葉をつづるスペリングチャレンジ冒険。
localizedDescription.ar: مغامرة تهجئة حيث يتهجى الأطفال الكلمات حرفاً بحرف.
localizedDescription.tr: Çocukların kelimeleri harf harf hecelediği bir heceleme macerası.
localizedDescription.nl: Een spelavontuur waar kinderen woorden letter voor letter spellen.
localizedDescription.da: Et staveventyr hvor børn staver ord bogstav for bogstav.
localizedDescription.la: Aventura litterationis ubi pueri verba litteram per litteram scribunt.
localizedDescription.zh: 一个拼写挑战冒险，孩子们逐字母拼写单词。
